title: Sackcloth and Scarlet
writer: Jules Furthman, Thomas J. Geraghty, George Gibbs
actors: Alice Terry, Orville Caldwell, Dorothy Sebastian
plot: Polly Freeman spends the night with farmer Stephen Edwards. She then returns home and confesses everything to her sister Joan. She cancels her own wedding to Sam Curtis and travels with Polly to Paris, where her child is born. Sam...
